_comment: Copy the relevant sections to your {{HOME_TOOL_DIR}}/settings.json

hooks._comment: Option 1: Just add reminder to run /reflect
Option 2: Auto-reflect if enabled via /reflect on
Option 3: Full integration with handover + backup + reflect
hooks.command: claude handover && uv run {{HOME_TOOL_DIR}}/hooks/pre_compact.py --backup && uv run {{HOME_TOOL_DIR}}/hooks/precompact_reflect.py --auto
